title: Statistics
seoTitle: Game of Darts Statistics | BarkinMad Studios
description: Understand Game of Darts player statistics, persisted session data, advanced statistics access, and current To Verify areas.
summary: Statistics are distributed across game view models, session persistence, player history, Player Stats, and Game Center submission.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for pending Game of Darts statistics image
sourceNotes: Detailed chart formulas and some aggregation behavior are To Verify in central docs.

sections.heading: Where stats come from
paragraphs: Game of Darts statistics are not centralized in one engine. They are calculated in per-game view models, persisted session models, Player Stats, and Game Center submission code.
Persisted session-backed history exists for X01, Snooker, Bob's 27, Cricket, and 1 to 20. Embedded player histories exist for X01, Snooker, Bob's 27, and Cricket.

sections.heading: Advanced statistics
paragraphs: Advanced Statistics access is gated by gameplay progression, Pro, or 48-hour access. The current central documentation says five confirmed finished games in a rolling 24-hour window unlock earned Session Stats.
Earned Session Stats are restricted to that rolling 24-hour window. Historical trends and broader all-time access require Pro or active 48-hour access.

sections.heading: Known limits
paragraphs: Several modes have in-game statistics but no persisted session model documented. Some chart, trend, and player-history aggregation details remain To Verify.
Quit or abandoned games do not count toward the Advanced Statistics completion gate according to the latest release notes.
